calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant
Off Calendar Jun-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Johnathan Huang, a/k/a Jonathan Huang, an indivudal.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Arden Burstein, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff Alliant Credit Union, an Illinois State Chartered Credit Union.
Robert Larsen, Recovery Supervisor for plaintiff, was present via CourtCall, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Johnathan Huang, a/k/a Jonathan Huang, an individual.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Conversion, Money had and Received, and Fraud - Intentional and/or Negligent Representation, was filed November 27, 2018, and personally served on defendant Johnathan Huang, a/k/a Jonathan Huang, an individual, on February 27, 2019.
Default as to defendant Johnathan Huang, a/k/a Jonathan Huang, an individual, was entered on April 18, 2019.
DOE defendants dismissed on January 10, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Alliant Credit Union, an Illinois State Chartered Credit Union, and against the defaulted defendant Johnathan Huang, a/k/a Jonathan Huang, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $52,745.82. (Amount Pled in Complaint is $52,745.85).
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $890.00.

Total - $52,635.82.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
